[{'text': "I'm at (10.94, 8.88) facing ~103° (roughly north-northwest). The destination is at (11.51, 13.67). 

Looking at the map structure - it appears to be a maze with horizontal corridors. The robot is currently in the wall between the middle and upper corridors. I need to find a vertical passage (gap in the wall) to get to the upper corridor.

The front is CAUTION at 0.89m (wall to the north). Let me try moving east more to find a gap in the north wall. Let me rotate back east and continue.

Actually, looking at the map image more carefully - the destination (green circle) appears to be in the upper-right area. The map shows horizontal black bands (walls) with white corridors between them. I need to find a vertical passage connecting the corridors.

Let me rotate right to face east and continue exploring.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_014jgVN5wmqxdwjyJP9nRdQY', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
